chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constt. Petition No. S- 392 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on Office objection-as Flag-A. 2. For hearing of main case. 17.07.2025. Mr. Munawar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, Sindh Mr. Abdul Rehman Bhutto, Advocate for Respondents No.1-A to1-C. ------------ Petitioner and his Counsel are called absent without intimation. In view of the order dated 07.4.2025, report has been furnished by learned Family Judge/ Civil Judge & J.M, Shikarpur, which reflects that despite notices and show cause notices the Petitioner is neither attending the family Court nor complying with the court orders. Furthermore, Counsel for decree holder has filed application for attachment of J.D’s property, blocking of CNIC and issuance of warrant. However, J.D, instead of filing objections, submitted that he is depositing decreetal amount in favour of D.H and sought adjournment on the ground that instant petition is pending before this court. Thereafter, J.D has deposited 20,000/- and now the matter is pending for objections on application for attachment of J.D’s property, blocking of his CNIC and issuance of warrant against J.D, in furtherance of execution proceedings. In view of the above, there is no need to interfere in smooth process of trial. Accordingly, instant petition is dismissed. J U D G E S.Ashfaq
